label: Noise — alternative scenario (imp)
definition: Alternative-scenario daytime L50 transportation-noise surface (dBA); exact scenario pending verification against the BTS source. (Result column: l50dba_imp.)

label: Noise — alternative scenario (nat)
definition: Alternative-scenario daytime L50 transportation-noise surface (dBA); exact scenario pending verification against the BTS source. (Result column: l50dba_nat.)

label: Noise — existing conditions
definition: Existing-conditions daytime road+aviation transportation-noise surface, L50 dBA. (Result column: l50dba_exi.)
